mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into organization (`name`, parentid, code, isn, `status`, `rank`, description, areacode, seq, createtime, updatetime) values (#{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{areacode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update organization set `name` = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, parentid = #{parentid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, code = #{code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, isn = #{isn,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `rank` = #{rank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, areacode = #{areacode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, seq = #{seq,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createtime = #{createtime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updatetime = #{updatetime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, `name`, parentid, code, isn, `status`, `rank`, description, areacode, seq, createtime, updatetime from organization where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, `name`, parentid, code, isn, `status`, `rank`, description, areacode, seq, createtime, updatetime from organization
